understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` without landing on spike tiles `u`/`v`.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is horizontal-only (`MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT`); after each move the player falls in the current gravity direction until hitting a solid tile or hazard. `CLICK` removes breakable `x` tiles at the target position. Landing on spikes ends the run. Each level allows 2 attempts of 50 turns; gravity direction dictates fall orientation.
